ohtani.title: Freddie Freeman and Justin Wrobleski shine in win
ohtani.blurb: Justin Wrobleski's six shutout innings and Freddie Freeman's 2-5 day lift the Dodgers to a 4-1 win over the Cardinals

imanaga.title: Happ, Imanaga lead Cubs to 2-0 win
imanaga.blurb: Ian Happ crushes a home run and Shota Imanaga strikes out five in seven scoreless frames, leading the Cubs to a 2-0 win over the D-backs

suzuki.title: Michael Busch drives in four runs in Cubs' win
suzuki.blurb: Michael Busch collects four RBIs and Matthew Boyd tosses six strong innings in the Cubs' 8-4 win over the D-backs

yoshida.title: Cam Smith's go-ahead hit in the 10th leads to win
yoshida.blurb: Cam Smith hits a two-run single in the top of the 10th to propel the Astros to a 3-1 extra-innings victory

okamoto.title: Luke Keaschall, bullpen clutch in Twins' 4-3 win
okamoto.blurb: Luke Keaschall drives an RBI double and the bullpen comes up clutch for the Twins to hold on against the Blue Jays, 4-3

murakami.title: Bogaerts, Canning lead the Padres to a 4-3 win
murakami.blurb: Xander Bogaerts’ go-ahead RBI single and Griffin Canning’s seven strikeouts lift the Padres to a 4-3 win over the White Sox
